# Money Maker Toolkit

AI revenue leak audits, workflow diagnostics, digital templates, and buyer journey tools.

## Use Notes
- No revenue guarantees.
- Paid product files are not publicly linked; use the order page first.
- Outreach email is paused; use these links for inbound, marketplace, profile, and account setup contexts.
